_meta.purpose: Stage 0b — promotes m_26_14-retention docs to dataset_retention score docs in m_26_14-scores. Uses a latest transform (unique_key: dataset) so each dataset has exactly one current score doc. The m_26_14-retention-to-scores dest pipeline enriches config thresholds, runs the retention_level ladder, and sets element:'dataset_retention', asset.id:'dataset:<ds>', _id:'dataset::<ds>'. These docs are the in-stack equivalent of score.py's per-dataset dataset_retention docs. Run AFTER m_26_14-dataset-retention (source must have data). Frequency: 1h offset +5m from Stage 0.
